docket_entries.description: EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED NOV-02-2015 ORDERED DESTROYED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIVSHITS, YELIZAVETA AS TO DEFENDANT HOSALKAR, HARISH

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-10-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-10-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY RUSSIAN INTERPRETER---ZEMA KATSNELSON. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT AT TODAYS HEARING. NO COSTS, IFP FILED BY PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-10-2015 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY LIVSHITS, YELIZAVETA AS TO DEFENDANT HOSALKAR, HARISH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-10-2015 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIVSHITS, YELIZAVETA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LIVSHITS, YELIZAVETA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT HOSALKAR, HARISH STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF LIVSHITS, YELIZAVETA ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT EXHIBITS, P/U BY K.ATSNELSON, ON BEHALF OF PLAINTIFF SIGNATURE ON FILE
